center.name: 昆仑山脉
center.summary: 昆仑山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括藏雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Tibetan rosefinch is found in northeastern Tibet, in the Buckhan Boda Shan, Amne Machin and Kunlun mountains in Qinghai

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Tibetan rosefinch is found in northeastern Tibet, in the Buckhan Boda Shan, Amne Machin and Kunlun mountains in Qinghai
